name: deslopper
description: Dev and release scripts for the deslopper Python package.

scripts.bump-release: ver-bump --help 2>&1 | grep -q -- '--bump' || { echo 'This ver-bump has no --bump targets: it would bump package.json alone and leave pyproject.toml behind. See RELEASING.md.' >&2; exit 1; } && .venv/bin/pytest -q && .venv/bin/deslopper lint && .venv/bin/python -m build --outdir "$(mktemp -d)" >/dev/null && ver-bump -c -p origin && git push --follow-tags && gh release create "v$(npm pkg get version | tr -d '\"')" --generate-notes
